title: Sprint 7: CI Health + NPT 20ps Validation Gate
problem_statement: Fix blocking CI failure in test_langevin_step_finite (safe_map reshape bug), investigate batched_equilibrate NaN, run oracle-mandated NPT 20ps stability gate, confirm EFA/MTT backlog status, and update CLAUDE.md for v1.0 release readiness.

steps.description: PARALLEL Day 1: Kick off NPT 20ps background run (40000 steps, 2-4 TIP3P waters, 300K, 1 bar, dt=0.5fs) AND recon safe_map reshape failure with compound pytrees (PaddedSystem + LangevinState)
steps.rationale: NPT run is longest-pole task; start immediately in parallel with CI work
steps.gate: NPT run started; safe_map bug confirmed

steps.description: Fix safe_map reshape bug at batched_simulate.py:593-631 — add assertion on uniform leading dim; test all call sites (batched_minimize, batched_equilibrate, batched_produce)
steps.gate: test_langevin_step_finite passes; all batched_ callers verified

steps.description: Add regression test for safe_map with heterogeneous-leaf pytree input (PaddedSystem + LangevinState compound)
steps.rationale: Prevent future safe_map regressions on compound pytrees

steps.description: Collect NPT 20ps results; evaluate against tightened gates: T=300±5K mean (last 10ps), P mean=1±50 bar (last 10ps), density Δρ<2% of 0.985 g/cm³ (HARD gate), no NaN
steps.gate: All 4 gates pass OR fallback: mark NPT experimental if any gate fails

steps.description: Update CLAUDE.md: NPT production example with 20ps validation evidence, batched_equilibrate cold-start safe pattern (defer NaN trace to Sprint 8), v1.0 constraints summary
steps.rationale: Deferred from Sprint 6; needed for v1.0

steps.description: Write CHANGELOG/release notes for v1.0: dt<=0.5fs constraint, NPT validated to 20ps, batched_equilibrate cold-start requirement, v2.0 roadmap pointer (constraint-aware thermostat)
steps.rationale: Users need release notes; CLAUDE.md is internal

steps.description: [TIME-PERMITTING] Recon EFA production validation status; update .praxia/backlog.jsonl MTT entry with confirmed status for Sprint 8 planning
steps.rationale: Informs Sprint 8 MTT scheduling; not v1.0 blocker

steps.description: Auditor: final v1.0 release readiness check across Sprint 7 changes
steps.gate: Audit PASS or specific blockers documented

conditions: Parallelize NPT 20ps run Day 1 with safe_map recon — do not serialize
Drop step 4 (oracle NaN scope decision); defer batched_equilibrate NaN to Sprint 8; document cold-start safe pattern in CLAUDE.md
Tighten NPT acceptance gates: mean P over last 10ps = 1±50 bar (not ±200); density Δρ <2% of 0.985 g/cm³ as HARD gate; T=300±5K mean over last 10ps
Add regression test for safe_map with heterogeneous-leaf pytree (PaddedSystem + LangevinState)
Add release notes / CHANGELOG entry: dt<=0.5fs constraint, 20ps NPT evidence, batched_equilibrate cold-start requirement, v2.0 roadmap pointer
EFA status recon (step 6) is time-permitting only; not v1.0 critical path
Optional: 1ps NPT smoke test on small protein-in-water; not a blocker
oracle_notes.approval_note: All 7 conditions addressed with one-to-one mapping. Tightened gates match specification. Step 8 auditor gate closes release loop cleanly.

title: Sprint 8: Batched test fixes + NPT 20ps gate + EFA sign-off
problem_statement: Three batched test call sites have API mismatches (test-side only): batched_minimize returns 3-tuple but test assigns to single var (line 174); batched_equilibrate requires (unique_batch, system_index, positions, key) but test calls (batch, key=..., n_steps=...) (line 186); batched_produce_streaming missing system_index arg (line 260). NPT 20ps run script has broken pressure calc at line 105. No 20ps validation test exists. EFA integrated but production readiness unconfirmed; blocks MTT backlog.

steps.description: Fix test_batched_minimize (line 174): unpack 3-tuple return: minimized_pos, converged, rms = batched_minimize(...)
Fix test_batched_equilibrate (line 186): add system_index=jnp.arange(B), pass system_index and batch.positions as positionals; remove invalid n_steps kwarg
Fix test_batched_produce_streaming (line 260): add system_index=jnp.arange(B) as 2nd positional arg

Fix NPT pressure bug in /tmp/npt_20ps_run.py line 105. Current broken code: `P_inst = float(jnp.prod(state.box[0])) / volume`. Replace with: (1) compute virial W = stress.virial_trace(positions, forces) [kcal/mol/Å³·Å³], (2) compute KE from momenta and masses, (3) call pressure.instantaneous_pressure_akma(KE, W, volume), (4) convert to bar: P_bar = P_akma * units.BAR_PER_AKMA_PRESSURE (=69477.0, units.py:32). Also copy script to scripts/validation/npt_20ps_run.py for durability.
steps.rationale: Critical bug; broken pressure calc invalidates 20ps results. BAR_PER_AKMA_PRESSURE=69477.0 at src/prolix/physics/units.py:32. virial_trace at stress.py:14; instantaneous_pressure_akma at pressure.py:14.

steps.description: Run fixed NPT 20ps script (40000 steps, 16 TIP3P waters, 300K, 1 bar, dt=0.5fs). 16 waters provides physically defensible pressure statistics (4 waters too small — instantaneous P fluctuations ~thousands of bar). Save results to /tmp/npt_20ps_results_final.json with full (T, P, V, density) timeseries.
steps.rationale: Long-pole task; must complete before audit gate
steps.gate: No NaN; timeseries complete and finite

steps.description: Audit NPT 20ps results (16 waters) against oracle-mandated gates: (i) T_mean(last 10ps) = 300±5K [absolute Kelvin], (ii) P_mean(last 10ps) = 1±100 bar [absolute bar, verify via BAR_PER_AKMA_PRESSURE=69477 at units.py:32], (iii) density error = |computed - 0.985| / 0.985 < 2% [HARD gate], (iv) no NaN in full timeseries. P gate widened from ±50 to ±100 bar: physically defensible for 16-water box. All 4 must PASS for 'approved'; log explicit failure reason if any fail.
steps.gate: All 4 gates PASS or explicit FAIL reason

steps.description: Recon: audit EFA completeness at src/prolix/physics/efa_coulomb.py; verify EFAParams, _lebedev_26, _fit_efa_params, efa_coulomb_energy all present and jit-compilable

Write EFA acceptance test (tests/physics/test_efa_coulomb.py, new). Verify: (i) accuracy: efa_coulomb_energy kernel output matches reference erf(αr)/r at r=[0.5, 1.0, 2.0, 5.0] Å within documented tolerance, (ii) determinism: multiple calls produce identical output, (iii) no NaN/inf across [0.3, 10] Å range. NOTE: efa_coulomb_energy is NOT wired into any production energy path (confirmed by rg). EFA 'production-ready' for MTT purposes means the standalone kernel API is correct; MTT Log-Det Estimator depends on the kernel API only, not production wiring. Document this scope explicitly in the test file docstring.
steps.rationale: MTT unblock requires verified kernel API, not production-path wiring. efa_coulomb_energy not imported by any src/ module outside efa_coulomb.py (confirmed). MTT only needs standalone kernel correctness.
steps.gate: Test PASS (EFA ready) or FAIL with specific reason

steps.description: Add test_npt_20ps_stability_gate to tests/physics/test_npt_barostat.py (marked slow). n_waters=16, steps=40000, dt=0.5fs, T=300K, P=1bar. Assertions: T_mean(last 10ps) in [295, 305]K; P_mean(last 10ps) in [-100, 102] bar; density error < 2%; no NaN. Encode only after step 6 (audit) passes.
steps.rationale: Commits oracle gate to test suite

steps.description: Oracle: final review of all three work streams (CI health, NPT stability, EFA readiness). Verdict: APPROVED or CONDITIONAL with explicit blockers

revisions_satisfied.R1_pressure_units: Step 4 cites BAR_PER_AKMA_PRESSURE=69477.0 at units.py:32 (verified); mandates virial_trace + instantaneous_pressure_akma; copies script to scripts/validation/ for durability.
revisions_satisfied.R2_water_count_and_gates: 16 TIP3P waters at Steps 5/6/9; P gate widened to ±100 bar with stated rationale; T ±5K and density <2% HARD gates preserved.
revisions_satisfied.R3_efa_scope: Step 8 explicitly scopes EFA as standalone kernel (not production-wired); MTT depends on kernel API only; scope documented in test docstring.

oracle_notes.minor_note: Step 9 P window encoded as [-100, 102] bar (asymmetric vs target 1±100); 1-bar discrepancy is below noise and non-blocking.
oracle_notes.approval_note: All three required corrections addressed cleanly. Cleared to execute.

outcome_narrative: 2/3 streams complete. EFA: 9/9 tests pass, production-ready, MTT unblocked. Batched API fixes: 3 call sites corrected (parse-level verified; end-to-end blocked by pre-existing flash_nonbonded.py:175 dtype bug). NPT 20ps gate: DEFERRED — gas-phase init + PME cutoff geometry requires >=200 waters and two-phase NVT->NPT protocol. Short NPT tests pass; integrator correct.
deferred_to_sprint9: NPT 20ps gate: two-phase NVT->NPT protocol with >=200 waters
lax.scan dtype carry audit across flash_*.py
